meaning: adj.好战的,积极从事或支持使用武力的
examples: The fiery right-wing leader toned down his militant statements after the meeting.
Saif looked less like a hedge funder and more like a fist-pumping militant in fatigues.
On average, only one out of every seven U.S. drone attacks in Pakistan kills a militant leader.
The Kremlin says it will press the Palestinian militant group to soften it's stance toward Israel.
Many on the right will hate that message and see it as complacent and insufficiently militant.
